package rulecoverage

func NegativeCookieWithoutSecureFlag() string {
    ruleID := "cookie_without_secure_flag"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`http.Cookie{...}` literals without `Secure: true` for session or authentication cookies"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
